# Usman Khizar

> SEO, GEO, and AEO specialist helping founders and businesses get found everywhere in search.

I am Usman Khizar, a search marketer specialising in:
- Search Engine Optimisation (SEO): Google organic rankings, technical SEO, on-page optimisation
- Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO): getting cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews
- Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO): featured snippets, zero-click results, structured content
- Parasite SEO: ranking on high-authority third-party platforms
- LinkedIn growth and personal brand building
- Digital product marketing via vibe coding

## Services
- SEO consulting for founders and businesses
- GEO strategy and implementation
- AEO content structuring
- LinkedIn content strategy

## Content
My blog covers modern search marketing, AI search optimisation, and LinkedIn growth. All content is written from direct experience with real projects.
